what_it_does: A living noticeboard guide that records the composition lane's retirement harvest: an honest, non-self-certifying current-state assessment separating what the author personally verified from what other lanes reported, listing remaining gaps and laws established.
observations: Central honest state is split by provenance: VERIFIED-BY-ME (the author's own tool output) versus REPORTED-BY-LANE (projection, recollection, fork, DNA) without independent confirmation.
The decision-surface, subtypes/owner, grounding-provenance, resolver contract, axes registry, L5 update contract, and archetype catalog are described as built and verified.
The operator loop never closed on a real Tim decide: decided-signal=0; Tim's yes was verbal only, with no decision_take mark.
An open loop owned by the author remains: axes/design.py value_source populate, pending recollection's 10,568 re-bake.
Honest unknowns include the current state of the factory backend, Face Pipeline, and V-symbol/identity.
Six laws are listed as established because each caught a real false-state this session.
The file references four external code/design documents and one other board item.
standouts: Operator loop never closed on a real Tim decide (decided-signal=0).
Laws established are framed as anti-false-state corrections from the session.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, source, state, title, author_session, links, and history.
Link kinds include sourced_from and references using board:// and code:// URI schemes.
Markdown body uses section headers, star markers, and bullet-like lists.
First-person voice and session-specific identifiers such as ch-o1wy1t07.
concerns: Heavily self-referential and assumes familiarity with the retirement protocol, lane names, and external files.
Dense jargon and shorthand make it hard to interpret without corpus context.
Some claims (e.g., 'caught a real false-state') are stated but not evidenced inside the file.
No code symbols or concrete artifacts anchor the verification claims.
notes: A first-person, provenance-aware retirement handoff note for the composition lane that deliberately marks what was personally verified, what was only reported, and what remains open.
questions: What is the retirement protocol and how does a harvest differ from a transcript-backbone?
What do the referenced code files (RESOLVER-CONTRACT.md, L5-CARD-UPDATE-CONTRACT.md, SUBTYPE-COVERAGE-GAP.md) actually specify?
What constitutes a 'Tim decide' and a decision_take mark?
What is recollection's 10,568 re-bake and what would completing axes/design.py value_source populate entail?
What are the factory backend, Face Pipeline, and V-symbol/identity in this project?
What do the six established laws mean in practice and how were they validated?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file presents itself as an honest verification-verdict harvest for the composition lane and does exactly that, separating verified-by-me, reported-by-lane, gaps, and laws.
apparent_themes: Epistemic honesty and refusal to self-certify.
Provenance separation between direct verification and secondhand reporting.
Closed-loop verification as the unit of truth.
Acknowledgment of unknowns and open loops.
intention_signals: The author is trying to produce a transparent, accountable end-of-lane snapshot that resists overclaiming by clearly labeling the source of each verification and exposing the uncrossed decision-authority line.
novelty: The explicit 'VERIFIED-BY-ME vs REPORTED-BY-LANE' provenance split and the 'operator loop never closed on a real Tim decide' framing make this more than a simple status report; it is a self-aware epistemic audit.
contribution: It contributes a provenance-labeled audit snapshot of the composition lane, a set of anti-false-state laws, and explicit boundaries between built, fabric-verified, and Tim-verified states, which a fused system can use to track uncertainty and verification lineage.
summary_for_embedding: A living noticeboard guide recording the composition lane's retirement harvest, splitting current-state claims by personal verification versus reported-by-lane provenance, noting unclosed operator loops, unknown backend areas, and session-captured anti-false-state laws.
intention_for_embedding: To create an honest, non-self-certifying handoff record that marks what the author verified, what others reported, what remains unknown, and what guardrails were learned.
